name: flow-09-refund-capacity
description: T104 RefundOrchestrator + T105 RefundProcessor + T106 EventCapacityManager + T107 WaitlistManager — ORCHESTRATION archetype. On retry exhaustion: emit RefundFailed AND push to F284 simultaneously.

nodes.description: Iron rule validation + DNA compliance check: emit-and-push-simultaneously, retry-exhaustion-two-actions, capacity-restore-on-refund

Break T104-T107 into: T104 orchestrate refund → T105 process payment reversal → on exhaustion: emit RefundFailed AND push F284 → T106 restore capacity → T107 dequeue waitlist
Generate refund-processor.service.ts — on retry exhaustion: emit RefundFailed AND push to F284 simultaneously. Both actions required.
Named check validation: emit_and_push_simultaneously, both_actions_on_exhaustion, capacity_restore_before_waitlist
Score generated code 0-100 against T104-T107 iron rules: dual action on exhaustion, capacity restore, waitlist dequeue
Route: score >= 85 → n8 promote, score < 85 → n3 iterate
